member.name: T:HbarAllowance
member.summary:
An approved allowance of hbar transfers for a spender.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a hbar allowance from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.FromProtobuf(Proto.CryptoAllowance)
member.summary: Create a hbar allowance from a crypto allowance protobuf.

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.FromProtobuf(Proto.GrantedCryptoAllowance)
member.summary: Create a hbar allowance from a granted crypto allowance protobuf.

member.name: P:HbarAllowance.Amount
member.summary: The amount of the spender's allowance in Tinybars

member.name: P:HbarAllowance.OwnerAccountId
member.summary: The account ID of the hbar owner (ie. the grantor of the allowance)

member.name: P:HbarAllowance.SpenderAccountId
member.summary: The account ID of the spender of the hbar allowance

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.ValidateChecksums(Client)
member.summary: Validate that the client is configured correctly.
member.exception: if entity ID is formatted poorly

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert a crypto allowance into a protobuf.

member.name: M:HbarAllowance.ToGrantedProtobuf
member.summary: Convert a crypto allowance into a granted crypto allowance protobuf.
